ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
justification: The primary issue is incorrect billing and the threat of public escalation increases urgency.

ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
justification: The issue describes broken functionality affecting business operations.

ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
justification: The ticket requests additional product capabilities rather than reporting failures.

ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
justification: The issue relates to data governance, privacy, and AI usage policies.

ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
justification: The ticket involves authentication and account access failure.
